headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co.: Bolt-On Acquisitions Fuel Growth
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. continues to leverage size and scale to buy smaller peers and fuel per-share metric growth. Read why AJG stock is a Buy.
